center.name: Interandean Valles
center.summary: Interandean Valles是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红尾彗星蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sapho is variously placed in central Bolivia and northern and western Argentina, in southern Bolivia, northern and western Argentina, and east-central Chile, and from southern Bolivia to western Argentina and northern Chile. The red-tailed comet inhabits arid montane scrublands on the eastern slope of the Andes and in valleys within the Andes
